name: XS GO Wax Pad Insert
summary: The AirVape XS GO wax pad insert allows you to use concentrate materials, expanding your device’s versatility for different session styles.
description: The AirVape XS GO wax pad insert allows you to use concentrate materials, expanding your device’s versatility for different session styles. Designed for a secure chamber fit, it provides a stable surface for consistent performance. Built from heat-resistant materials for reliable, long-term use. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
